new art (2025-)

music

DERA9V1META

5 min noisy ambient piece i made using various pieces of digital and analog equipment. took about 2 days

  • chords made in microtonal ultrabox (a community mod of beepbox)
  • used sounds from recordings i have made in the past few years
  • edited using cassette tape recorder and audacity
  • lots of feedback and compression and hissing
lwnv · DERA9V1META

2625Z7

24 sec idm style piece i made using beepbox. took about 1 day

lwnv · 2625Z7

R0 (undertale ost - fallen down cover)

made using beepbox, spent about 1.5 days on it total. it is a very glitchy idm style cover

lwnv · R0 (undertale ost - fallen down cover)
